svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(229, 20, 0), rgb(255, 146, 129)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(178, 0, 0), rgb(255, 172, 172));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 98px; height: 1px; padding-top: 31px; margin-left: 287px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(229, 20, 0), rgb(255, 146, 129)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(178, 0, 0), rgb(255, 172, 172));
